my_thoughts: The thresholding mechanism with UM_06 feels like clinical_curiosity is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The scientific_materialism, objectification suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'As scientists we want to find out if there is a uniqueness behind the apparent s'—clinical curiosity via scientific materialism, objectification. Teacher responds '' using thresholding to challenges method, dismisses subjects. Opening UNMAKING move addresses clinical curiosity. Predicting resist intellectually because thresholding interventions typically produce this response.
visible_response:
Don't you have any other way of finding out than going to these yogins...?
The second-raters may submit to your scrutiny, but the real McCoy, if there is one, will never submit to your tests.
